name: ReportDistributionChannelCS
title: Report Distribution Channel
description: Distribution channels for radiology and diagnostic reports in the German healthcare system. Includes the national KIM (Kommunikation im Medizinwesen) secure messaging standard.

concept.definition: Report delivered via fax (still widely used in German ambulatory care)
Report delivered via KIM (Kommunikation im Medizinwesen) — national DE secure medical messaging
Report delivered to patient via secure online portal (e.g. Patientenportal / ePA)
Report printed and handed over or mailed as paper document
